productDisplayName: Doodle Boy's I love Driving Green Kidswear
description: CompositionGreen crew neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves and chest printFittingRegularWash careMachine wash in cold water with like colours in a delicate cycleDo not bleachTumble dry low or lay flat to dryWarm iron when neededDo not iron on printSurprise your little boy with this doodle t-shirt which features everything that he loves to do - draw, play with cars, make weird sounds and enjoy the crazy. This cotton tee will keep him cool and comfortable all day, while he discovers the enjoyable life of being a little boy. Pair this with denim shorts and floaters for a playful look.
